headline: Baird Raises its Price Target on Jabil (JBL)
summary: Jabil Inc. (NYSE:JBL) is one of the 12 High Quality Stocks to Buy for the Long Term. On June 18, 2026, Baird analyst Luke Junk raised the firm’s price target on Jabil Inc. (NYSE:JBL) to $440 from $355 and maintained an Outperform rating on the shares. Junk updated Baird’s model following Jabil’s Q3 results. Also […]

headline: 5 Stocks In The Spotlight Last Week:  Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Weigh In
summary: Wall Street analysts make daily stock picks, but not all have good track records. Benzinga's API provides high-quality ratings from top analysts.
